chunks.title: CallMetric AI / BilSoft — AI Development
chunks.text: Jun 2025 – Present, İzmir & Düzce. AI-powered CRM call analytics: speech-to-text, speaker diarization, emotion analysis, LLMs/SLMs, data masking, FastAPI, AWS (EC2, EKS, SageMaker, S3, RDS), Kubernetes, Docker. Fine-tuned Whisper reducing WER from ~35% to ~12% on in-domain audio. Built multi-tenant RAG pipelines with Redis queues. Model efficiency: quantization, PEFT, LoRA, QLoRA. BDDK/GDPR-aware practices.

chunks.title: Norm Digital / Vinter — AI Specialist
chunks.text: Short-term internship. CV data extraction: unstructured resume text to structured fields and JSON blob outputs for downstream screening. LangChain, Llama, Hugging Face, FAISS, RAG, prompt engineering, semantic search, OCR-based resume parsing.

chunks.title: Expertel SA / Proceedit (FinTech) — AI Development
chunks.text: Aug 2024 – Feb 2025, Barcelona. International team; daily Scrum on Google Meet; Jira and Kubernetes. Flask, GraphQL, financial time-series, LSTM, Prophet, KAN networks. Web scraping for live market data without official APIs; Tor, Selenium, proxy networks; visualizations (scatter plots) for supervisor reporting.
